description_long: This house features a simple rectangular structure with a steeply pitched gable roof in a dark color, likely made of metal or composite panels. The exterior walls are smooth and light-colored, possibly finished with plaster or painted concrete. One side of the house has a single, vertically oriented window, while the opposite side features a large, floor-to-ceiling glass entryway that opens onto a wooden-floored area, suggesting a modern, open-plan interior. The roof extends slightly beyond the walls, providing minimal overhang. The overall design is minimalistic, with clean lines and no visible decorative elements or ornamentation. The house appears to be a single-story dwelling, suitable for a compact urban lot.
description: A modern, single-story house with a steep gable roof, light-colored walls, and a large glass entryway. The design is minimalistic with clean lines and a wooden-floored entrance area.
description_view_0: This view shows a plain wall with a single vertical window and the dark, ridged gable roof above.
description_view_1: The gable end of the house is visible, showing the triangular roof peak and a solid, windowless wall.
description_view_2: Similar to view 0, this side also features a single vertical window and the same roof structure.
description_view_3: The front of the house is shown, with a large glass entryway and a wooden-floored area inside, framed by the gable roof.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with one vertical window and a large glass entryway
attribute_entryway_design: Large glass entryway with no visible door frame, opening onto a wooden-floored area, minimalistic and without decorative elements
